# HAWK — Cybersecurity for US small and midsize practices

HAWK is an attack surface management (ASM) SaaS tool built for US dental practices, law firms, and CPA / tax firms.

## What HAWK does
- Scans domains for exposed attack surfaces
- Detects lookalike and typosquat domains targeting your brand
- Checks if your business credentials have been breached (HaveIBeenPwned)
- Monitors SPF, DKIM, and DMARC email security records
- Generates compliance ready PDF security reports aligned to HIPAA, FTC Safeguards Rule, and ABA Formal Opinion 24-514

## Pricing
HAWK Core $249 USD per month, HAWK Guard $449 USD per month, HAWK Sentinel $799 USD per month. Every plan includes a Breach Response Guarantee: $250K on Core, $1M on Guard, $2.5M on Sentinel.

## Who it is for
US small and midsize dental practices, law firms, accountants, CPAs, and tax professionals handling regulated data under HIPAA, FTC Safeguards Rule, and ABA Model Rules.

## Company
Built by AKB Studios (akbstudios.com). Contact: hello@akbstudios.com
